title: Add Generador de Cmics - V2 to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Generador de Cmics - V2](https://proyectodescartes.org/IATools/127_Generador_de_comics-V2/) to image
- Genera cómics a partir de texto, guiones o imágenes, personaliza paneles y exporta resultados con Generador de Cmics - V2.

Fixes #9118

gist.headline: Panel by panel
gist.blurb: The community just dropped Generador de Cómics V2 into the greenhouse. Turn your text and scripts into custom comic panels without touching a pencil.
gist.summary: Added 'Generador de Cómics - V2' to the community apps showcase, a tool for generating and customizing comic panels from text, scripts, or images.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and use this Spanish-language comic generation tool directly from the Pollinations app directory.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a comic book artist. Drawing comic panels on a drafting table. The robot companion holding up a finished comic page. Comic book elements mixed with cozy pixel art.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, drawing a pixelated comic book page on a wooden drafting table. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, holding up a finished comic panel glowing with soft lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, holding up a finished comic panel glowing with soft lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background.
